concerns.text: T066 verification omits Constitution Principle V requirement to update state file's updated_at timestamp. Verification only checks artifact_hashes map, missing the timestamp update mandated by Constitution Principle V: 'Every research-stage artifact change updates this project's state/projects/...yaml updated_at timestamp.'

T036 verification fails to explicitly verify FR-006's prohibition on reporting p-values for census data. Task computes correlations with effect sizes but verification doesn't confirm p-values are NOT reported, a key constraint for census data per FR-006 and Constitution Principle VII exception.

T026a verification incorrectly categorizes tabulated core invariants (crossing number, braid index) as 'computed' per Constitution Principle VI verification. FR-003 and SC-008 explicitly state core invariants are TABULATED from Knot Atlas, not computed; algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants (Phase 2+). Verification language conflates these categories.

T040 verification omits FR-013's skip condition verification. FR-013 requires: (1) ≥90% match threshold AND (2) skip validation when KnotInfo reference coverage <90%. T040 only verifies match threshold, missing the coverage skip condition that must be documented per FR-013.
